portraitResource.label: Portrait Bar
portraitResource.hint: Resource bar that will be shown as an overlay on top of the portrait image. Set to 'None' to disable.

floatingSize.name: Floating Size
floatingSize.hint: The size of the floating window. Larger values create a larger window. This does not affect Horizontal (Docked) mode.

portraitSize.name: Carousel Size
portraitSize.hint: The maximum size of portraits in the carousel. Portraits are reduced automatically if too many combatants must fit on screen.

carouselStyle.name: Carousel Style
carouselStyle.hint:
How portraits are arranged and move in the carousel: Carousel - Centered: the active combatant stays in the center and others rotate around it.
- Carousel - Left: the active combatant stays on the left and others rotate around it.
- No Carousel: combatants stay in dock order and only the active combatant moves.

overflowStyle.name: Overflow Style
overflowStyle.hint: How the carousel behaves when too many combatants must fit on screen.

portraitAspect.name: Portrait Aspect Ratio
portraitAspect.hint: The portrait aspect ratio. Images are cropped if they do not match the selected ratio.

roundness.name: Roundness
roundness.hint: The roundness of portraits and tooltips.

showDispositionColor.name: Show Disposition Color
showDispositionColor.hint: Show disposition color in the bottom border of the portrait.

hideDefeated.name: Hide Defeated
hideDefeated.hint: Hide defeated combatants from the carousel. They remain visible in the regular combat tracker if you still need to interact with them.

portraitImageBorder.name: Player Border
portraitImageBorder.hint: Special border shown for player characters. Leave blank to disable. If you want a custom image, the default one is a good size reference.

attributeColor.name: Attribute Color
attributeColor.hint: Color of the main tracked attribute text and bar in the carousel. Any valid CSS color is supported.

attributeColor2.name: Secondary Attribute Color
attributeColor2.hint: Color of the secondary tracked attribute text and bar in the carousel. Any valid CSS color is supported.

attributeColorPortrait.name: Portrait Attribute Color
attributeColorPortrait.hint: Color of the portrait overlay resource bar. Any valid CSS color is supported.

barsPlacement.name: Bars Placement
barsPlacement.hint: Placement of tracked attribute bars in the carousel.

attributeVisibility.name: Attribute Visibility
attributeVisibility.hint: How tracked attributes are displayed in the carousel.

playerPlayerPermission.name: Always Show Player Info
playerPlayerPermission.hint: Allow all players to see tracked attributes, tooltip information, and system icons for other players.

displayDescriptions.name: Show Descriptions
displayDescriptions.hint: Show active effect descriptions in the tooltip.

portraitImage.name: Portrait Image
portraitImage.hint: Whether to use the Actor image or Token image for the portrait.

portraitImageBackground.name: Portrait Background
portraitImageBackground.hint: Background image shown behind the portrait if the portrait is transparent or does not fill the frame.

hideConflictingUIs.name: Hide Conflicting UIs
hideConflictingUIs.hint: Automatically hide other UIs docked at the top of the screen when the dock is visible.

displayName.name: Display Name
displayName.hint: Whether to display the combatant name in the tooltip. 'Based on Token' only shows the name if the player can see the token name.

hideFirstRound.name: Hide Until First Turn
hideFirstRound.hint: Hide enemies until they take their first turn in combat. LibWrapper is required to also hide them in the core tracker.

attributesMenu.name: Tooltip Attributes
attributesMenu.label: Configure Attributes
attributesMenu.hint: Configure custom attributes shown in the tooltip.
attributesMenu.resetWarning: Are you sure you want to reset attributes to their default values?

form.notes: Leave the Attribute field blank to remove it.

resource.name: Secondary Resource
resource.hint: The secondary resource bar. You should usually set this in combat configuration. This setting is here for manual adjustments.

portraitResource.name: Portrait Resource
portraitResource.hint: The resource bar shown as an overlay on top of the portrait image. You should usually set this in combat configuration. This setting is here for manual adjustments.

add-event.title: Add Event
add-event.error: Error: You must provide a name and an image for the event.

combat-tracker-dock.deleteEffectContent: Are you sure you want to delete the effect
